summary: August 18, 2022: over the past week, the sea ice has now decreased by a higher rate from last week of 6.47% , from the level on 08/11/2022 of 6.339 M km 2 to 5.929 M km 2 for this week. title: Three new in-region hospitalizations and 240 new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta August 13–19
summary: During the week of August 13-19, YKHC reports three new in-region hospitalizations and 240 new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 15 August, 2022
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 15 August, 2022 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: Three Can Chili
summary: Ingredients 1 can beans 1 can crushed tomatoes 1 can corn Chili Powder to taste Preparation Drain and rinse the beans and corn to remove excess salt. Add to medium sized pot. Add entire can, liquid included, of crushed tomatoes to the pot. Add small amount of chili powder to pot and cook over medium...

title: Salmon Chowder
summary: Ingredients 3/4 cup rice 1 potato 1/4 teaspoon salt 1/2 teaspoon lemon pepper 1 teaspoon garlic 1/2 teaspoon parsley 1/2 package of bacon 1/2 white onion 1 can evaporated milk 1 can peas 1 can carrots 1 cup fiddleheads water Preparation Fill pot 3/4 full with water and heat on medium to medium high...

title: Slow Cooker Moose Roast
summary: Ingredients 1 lb Moose Roast (or any kind of meat) 1 jar pepperoncini Preparation Place roast in slow cooker or large pot Cover with contents of pepperoncini jar, including the liquid Cover and cook on low heat for 8-10 hours

title: Musk Ox Burgers
summary: Ingredients 1 lb Ground musk ox (or any kind of meat) 3 Tablespoons worcestershire sauce 1/4 Teaspoon salt 1/4 Teaspoon pepper Preparation Preheat oven to 375 ºF Mix all of the ingredients in a medium size bowl Shape meat into individual patties Place on baking sheet and bake for 15-24 minutes

title: Berry Water
summary: Ingredients 2 Cups berries 1 Quart water Preparation Add berries to water Serve as is or refrigerate

title: Salmon Fried Rice
